allow: PowerShell(git --version; "---"; \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; "---gitconfig---"; git config --global user.name; git config --global user.email)

PowerShell("--- SSH keys ---"; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.ssh"\) { Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.ssh" -Name } else { "no .ssh dir" }; "--- git credential helper ---"; git config --global credential.helper; "--- GH env token? ---"; if \($env:GH_TOKEN -or $env:GITHUB_TOKEN\) { "token env present" } else { "no token env" })
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Ajout du simulateur Monte Carlo CdM 2026 \(Elo + Poisson\) + README, requirements, .gitignore *)
